title: Align OSCORE context export (PRK_out -> PRK_exporter -> master secret/salt) between Rust export_context and Python export_oscore
description: Fix edhoc_kdf calls in export_context (lines ~311-335) to match Python _edhoc_kdf with correct labels (7 for PRK_out?, 10 for exporter, 0/1 for OSCORE). Ensure identical byte outputs per test vectors.
close_reason: Aligned OSCORE context export between Rust edhoc::export_context and Python edhoc.Edhoc*::export_oscore using consistent PRK_out (label 7), PRK_exporter (label 10), master secret (0) and salt (1) derivation with updated edhoc_kdf to use TH parameter and integer labels for identical test vector outputs. Fixed all call sites. Updated both implementations.
